mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVS_GRADE ( SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, EVS_TYPE, EVS_GRADE, IS_INCLUDE, START_SCORE, END_SCORE, SCORE, DISTRIBUTION_RATE, REMARK, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '14015138', #{evsGrade, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isInclude, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startScore, jdbcType=VARCHAR},1, #{endScore, jdbcType=VARCHAR},0, #{score, jdbcType=VARCHAR},0, #{distributionRate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},0, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR},200, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_GRADE SET EVS_TYPE = #{evsType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EVS_GRADE = #{evsGrade, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_INCLUDE = NVL(#{isInclude, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), START_SCORE = #{startScore, jdbcType=VARCHAR}1, END_SCORE = #{endScore, jdbcType=VARCHAR}0, SCORE = #{score, jdbcType=VARCHAR}0, DISTRIBUTION_RATE = #{distributionRate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}0, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACTIVITY = #{activity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
